failed_attempts: Kernel.IndepFun.prod_right hX hY hZ h (Kernel.map_condKernel hZ μ)

rw [Kernel.indepFun_iff_ae_indepFun] at h ⊢
  filter_upwards [h, ae_condDistribution_ae_eq μ (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance)] with x hx hxZ
  have hZ_ae : Z =ᵐ[condDistribution (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) μ x] fun _ ↦ Z x :=
    hxZ.mono fun y hy ↦ (hy _ ⟨{Z x}, measurableSet_singleton _, rfl⟩).mpr rfl
  exact hx.prod_mk_right (IndepFun.ae_eq (ae_eq_refl X) hZ_ae.symm (indepFun_const X (Z x) _)) hY hZ

rw [CondIndepFun, Kernel.indepFun_iff_ae_indepFun] at h ⊢
  filter_upwards [h, condKernel_ae_eq_const μ hZ le_rfl,
    ae_condKernel_isProbabilityMeasure (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) μ] with ω h_indep h_const h_prob
  let _ := h_prob
  have h_ae : (fun x ↦ (Y x, Z x)) =ᵐ[condKernel _ μ ω] (fun x ↦ (Y x, Z ω)) :=
    EventuallyEq.prod_mk (ae_eq_refl _)
      ((ae_iff_measure_eq_one (hZ (measurableSet_singleton (Z ω)))).mpr (h_const.trans measure_univ.symm))
  exact (h_indep.comp measurable_id (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const)).ae_eq (ae_eq_refl _) h_ae.symm

rwa [condIndepFun_iff_condExp_ae_eq hX (hY.prod_mk hZ), MeasurableSpace.comap_prod_mk,
    sup_assoc, sup_comm, sup_idem, sup_left_comm, ← condIndepFun_iff_condExp_ae_eq hX hY]

rw [Kernel.indepFun_iff_ae_indepFun] at h ⊢

  exact IndepFun.ae_eq_right (hz.comp measurable_id (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const))

rw [CondIndepFun, Kernel.IndepFun] at h ⊢
  rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty α with hα | hα

end IndepFun
